message:
Add colored icons to changelog page

Add a color field to each changelog project and update components
to render icons using Tenzir brand color tokens (blue, green,
purple, orange). The sync-changelog script now includes color data
in generated sidebar topics and LinkCards.

- Updated src/changelog-projects.json with color assignments
- Modified scripts/sync-changelog.mjs to include color metadata
- Enhanced Sidebar, TopicDropdown, and LinkCard components
  to support colored icons via data-color attribute

Co-Authored-By: Claude Code <noreply@anthropic.com>
